---
title: "IA Generativa"
subtitle: "Notes"
author: "Edgar Tobón Sosa"
date: last-modified
lang: es
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    papersize: letter
    geometry:
      - top=30mm
      - left=25mm
      - right=25mm
      - bottom=30mm
    header-includes: |
      \usepackage{fancyhdr}
      \pagestyle{fancy}
      \fancyhead[R]{Multiplicación de Matrices}
---
\newpage
